hook.summary: A crowd of people at a 'wave to earth' event are all seen playing Block Blast on their phones.
hook.visual_action: The camera pans over a seated audience in a dark venue, showing multiple phone screens running the game simultaneously.
hook.text_overlay:
wave to earth fans fr

scene_flow: Panning shot of a crowd at a venue where multiple people are playing Block Blast on their phones.
Close-up of a user's phone screen showing the block-fitting gameplay in action.
Text overlays highlight the game's addictive nature and brain-training benefits over crowd footage.
Final animated end card with the game logo, search bar, and app store download buttons.
on_screen_text: Block Blast is free and so addictive
Easy to solve but hard to get high scores
can train your brain and improve your IQ
Tap below and play for free!
cta_text: Tap below and play for free!
audience_proxy: Gen Z and young adult casual gamers looking for a popular and mentally stimulating way to kill time during events.
